name: trust-runtime-monorepo
description: A trust runtime and disrupted-trip reference environment for computer-use agents.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,sandbox,runtime -c cyan,magenta,yellow "pnpm --filter @trust/web dev" "pnpm --filter @trust/sandbox dev" "uv run --project apps/runtime uvicorn trust_runtime.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.lint: pnpm -r lint && uv run --all-packages ruff check apps packages evals
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && uv run --all-packages ruff format --check apps packages evals
scripts.format: prettier --write . && uv run --all-packages ruff format apps packages evals
